findings.suggestedFix: Present consent options neutrally, giving equal visual weight to accepting tracking and rejecting it (or choosing a paid ad-free option). Ensure that rejecting tracking is a clear and easy path, not hidden or made more difficult than accepting.

findings.title: Extensive Third-Party Tracking Disclosure
findings.evidence: The consent wall explicitly states the involvement of '243 eingesetzten Drittanbietern' (243 third-party providers) for tracking, which can significantly erode user confidence in privacy and data security.
findings.suggestedFix: Re-evaluate the necessity of such a large number of third-party integrations. Provide more granular control over specific categories of third parties or data uses, rather than an all-or-nothing acceptance. Clearly explain the purpose and necessity of each category of third-party data processing.
